title: Accessible radio group component with controlled and uncontrolled state
purpose: Provides a customizable radio group UI element that supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage patterns with proper accessibility attributes.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named RadioGroup that accepts various props for configuration including options, value, label, and orientation. Includes TypeScript interfaces for props and options.

steps.content: Generate a unique identifier for the radio group instance.
Initialize internal state for managing the selected value when not controlled externally.
Determine whether to use the controlled value or internal state as the current value.
Define a change handler that updates internal state and notifies the parent component.
Render the radio group label if provided.
Render the collection of radio options with appropriate accessibility attributes.
Exit early if the radio group is disabled.
Update the internal state with the new value.
Notify the parent component of the value change if an onChange handler is provided.
